name: G-2 source-organized file format: file missing the source: header is rejected by validate-source-file
command: printf 'rules:\n  - id: g-test-001\n' > sf.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" "$PWD/sf.yaml" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && echo header_required 1>&2
